name: digital-marketing-pro
description: v3.7.5 ships 3 new skills closing the v3.7.4 audit gaps: /validate-profile (brand profile + connector health check, no credential exposure), /campaign-audit (cross-channel current-state inventory + 4-tier triage), /launch-campaign (multi-channel 14-step launch orchestrator with checkpointed activation). 150-skill digital marketing engagement methodology for Cursor — 12-Part Strategy Flow, Four Core Documents, SEO/AEO/GEO (6 platforms including Google AI Mode), ads, email, social, EU AI Act Article 50 compliance, agency operations. Shared model curator (scripts/model_registry.json + resolve_model.py + refresh_models.py): single source of truth for every AI model id used by the plugin, with deprecated-id auto-fall-forward and a refresh_models.py drift report against live provider catalogs (Anthropic / OpenAI / Google). See docs/MODEL-CURATOR.md.
